channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🔴 Dossier 2026-04-09 — ⚡ Storm · Gold: ET
item.description:
🔴 ⚡ Storm · SPY ▲ 2.5% · VIX 21.5

VIX is screaming "Storm" at 21.

🥇 Gold Pick: ET — Score: 48/100 (A)

📡 147 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Made a searching and fearless inventory of our portfolio. And then wished we hadn't." — Sam
